remote-validate.command: ./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars ansible-syntax role-argument-specs shell json health-probes data-models generated-docs generated-portals
remote-validate.local_fallback_command: ./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars ansible-syntax role-argument-specs shell json health-probes data-models generated-docs generated-portals

remote-packer-build.command: test -n "$IMAGE" || { echo "set IMAGE=<name>" >&2; exit 1; }; cd packer && packer build -var-file=variables/common.pkrvars.hcl "templates/${IMAGE}.pkr.hcl"
remote-packer-build.local_fallback_command: test -n "$IMAGE" || { echo "set IMAGE=<name>" >&2; exit 1; }; cd packer && packer build -var-file=variables/common.pkrvars.hcl "templates/${IMAGE}.pkr.hcl"

remote-image-build.command: test -n "$SERVICE" || { echo "set SERVICE=<service-id>" >&2; exit 1; }; test -n "$COMMAND" || { echo "set COMMAND='docker build ...'" >&2; exit 1; }; bash -lc "$COMMAND"
remote-image-build.local_fallback_command: test -n "$SERVICE" || { echo "set SERVICE=<service-id>" >&2; exit 1; }; test -n "$COMMAND" || { echo "set COMMAND='docker build ...'" >&2; exit 1; }; bash -lc "$COMMAND"
